title: TLS 1.3 Handshake
description: Analyze the efficiency improvements of the TLS 1.3 handshake, including 1-RTT and 0-RTT modes. Explain the role of Diffie-Hellman in achieving Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS) in TLS 1.3. Evaluate the security implications of removed insecure ciphers in TLS 1.3.
objectives: Analyze the efficiency improvements of the TLS 1.3 handshake, including 1-RTT and 0-RTT modes.
Explain the role of Diffie-Hellman in achieving Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS) in TLS 1.3.
Evaluate the security implications of removed insecure ciphers in TLS 1.3.
